name: playmatrix-clean-production
description: PlayMatrix production build - seven active games including Matrix Siege: Mini Ordu

scripts.build: npm run check:server && npm run check:routes && npm run check:browser
scripts.check:browser: node --input-type=module --check < script.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/home/app.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/home/game-catalog.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/home/modal/modal-registry.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/home/tools/message-map.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/playmatrix-api.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/firebase-runtime.js && node --input-type=module --check < admin/matrix-dashboard.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/home/home-core.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/js/games/crash/index.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/chess/script.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/pisti/script.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/snake-pro/script.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/space-pro/script.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/pattern-master/script.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/avatar-frame.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/game-topbar-sync.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/playmatrix-runtime.js && node --input-type=module --check < public/dob-picker.js && node --input-type=module --check < games/matrix-siege/script.js && node --check public/js/games/matrix-siege/simulation-core.js
scripts.check:routes: node --check server/routes/admin.routes.js && node --check server/routes/promo.routes.js && node --check server/routes/wheel.routes.js && node --check server/games/crash/index.js && node --check server/games/chess/index.js && node --check server/games/pisti/index.js && node --check server/games/classicEngine.js && node --check server/core/recentActivityService.js && node --check server/core/wheelRightsService.js && node --check server/core/userSessionService.js && node --check server/core/maintenanceService.js && node --check server/routes/auth.routes.js && node --check server/core/security.js && node --check server/games/matrix-siege/index.js && node --check server/games/matrix-siege/config-service.js
